name: Climb The Tower! Dungeon Crawl RPG
description:
Tower Dungeon Crawl RPG

Welcome to the metropolis of Aerelon, the Tower City! Here adventurers brave traveling into the Tower for rare goods, textiles, gems and anything else the city could possibly need in order to survive. The Tower has been standing for as long as anyone can remember and provides for the surrounding city. Though make no mistake, the interior is dangerous - each floor boasting a unique atmosphere, monsters, puzzles, and danger around every corner.

Not all who venture into the Tower are merchants or porters, however. There are guilds and adventuring groups that enter to clear the floors, allowing better quality resources to flood the market place.

The Tower is said to have 100 floors and the first person to clear Floor 100 will have their wish granted.

Currently? Only up to Floor 11 has been cleared.

Do you dare brave the tower and claim your prize?

NOTICE:

Going forward, all updates to this bot will be on other platforms. You can find the updated version of this bot (including open spell & skill lorebooks, open traits, updated text, updated coding, as well as NPC images that show up when that NPC is on screen over on my Linktree and by clicking the first link listed [LINKTREE HERE]! Thank you!

》Quick Look: A typical dungeon crawl with RPG mechanics. Stats, HP/MP, Inventory, Skills, etc.

》My Other RPG Bots:

  • Foria: Isekai RPG

  • Aegis: Grimdark Fantasy RPG

Tips, Tricks & Suggestions:

Chat Memory Usage: It is highly recommended to use the Chat Memory for:

  • Current Stats: Just in case the bot doesn't add it to the Status Window. The current stats are: STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS, CHA, & LUCK.

  • Companions: & Info Regarding Companions (Skills, level, etc. Your discretion).

  • Spell/Skill Info: Get a unique skill that has certain requirements? Toss it in the Chat Memory!

  • Reputations (Optional): Can come up in the bot, but isn't coded to be tracked in the Status Window!

  • Titles (Optional): Not coded for tracking in Status Window, but can be a fun additional, especially if Titles come with perks.

  • Current Status Effects (Optional): Poisoned, Diseased, Stunned, etc.

Pr
creator: Aurellea
